examples.title: Algorithm: Insert at Beginning
examples.description: Insert a new node at the beginning of a linked list
examples.code:
ALGORITHM InsertAtBeginning
INPUT: head, data
OUTPUT: updated head

BEGIN
 newNode = CreateNode(data)
 newNode.next = head
 head = newNode
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of inserting a new node at the beginning of a linked list
